name: World Championship Barbequed Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the barbecue sauce ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a rolling boil and simmer for 1.5 hours, stirring every 10 minutes or so.
3. Pour into sterilized canning jars, seal, and let stand 2-6 weeks before use.
4. Mix all rub ingredients thoroughly.
5. Sprinkle the dry rub generously on the ribs.
6. Allow the ribs to sit at room temperature for 20-30 minutes until the rub appears wet.
7. Prepare a smoker for long, slow cooking (230°F indirect heat) using hickory chips or other hardwood chips.
8. Cook the ribs, bone side down, for 2 hours at 230°F in the smoker using indirect heat.
9. Turn the ribs and cook for an additional 2 hours.
10. Turn the ribs again and cook for one more hour.
11. During the last 15 minutes of cooking, baste with diluted barbecue sauce (half water).
12. Serve ribs with warmed, undiluted sauce on the side.
